actions.title: Configure server-side Privy auth
actions.why: Real app mutations must be verified server-side, not only gated by client sign-in.

actions.title: Create a creator-attached X listing with live URL proof
actions.why: Tips and agent runs need a real creator listing target with a creator-supplied X post link, pasted content, and live URL proof.

actions.title: No shipped seed feed or X posting routes
actions.why: No source, compiled seed marketplace feed, demo workflow route, X posting/OAuth routes, or X OAuth env assignments are present.

actions.title: Verify a Flutterwave sandbox deposit
actions.why: Naira balance is credited only after a Flutterwave checkout receipt and transaction verification match the same tx_ref.

actions.title: Get an accepted Flutterwave sandbox payout
actions.why: The verifier requires Flutterwave to accept the payout request and settled Arc/Circle/x402 creator earnings to cover accepted payouts for that creator; sandbox API errors do not count.
commands: Settle a creator tip before payout if the creator has no earnings

actions.title: Arc Testnet wallet balance proof
actions.why: 17.715270056818493 native USDC on Arc chain 5042002 for 0x6BAeB217DBF5B53c9A1Ba88750fFF6c0cA7931E3 (live Arc RPC).

actions.title: Circle Gateway spendable balance
actions.why: 1.290324 USDC available in Gateway (live Circle Gateway).

actions.title: Fan budget backed by Circle Gateway
actions.why: Budget 1.290323 USDC is covered by 1.290324 USDC in Gateway.

actions.title: x402/Circle settlement proof
actions.why: Payment receipt 28b5beb4-692d-4abe-98b9-5b7754ce7a8d settled on eip155:5042002 through Circle Gateway.

actions.title: Settle a tip for a creator-attached listing
actions.why: Creator balances only count settled x402/Circle/Arc proof tied to the current creator feed and written to proofs/real-tip.json.

actions.title: Circle/x402 wallet env configured
actions.why: Fan signer and creator address are configured.
